title: Content quality and assessment calibration audit

acceptance_criteria.text: Review a representative sample from A+, Network+, and Security+ for clarity, originality, ambiguity, distractor quality, explanation usefulness, and objective fit.
Evaluate mock exam calibration signals: domain weighting, difficulty mix, PBQ count, multi-select density, pass/fail feel, and whether scores are likely too easy or too harsh.
Create a rubric for future question, lesson, flashcard, and PBQ review that is stricter than schema/coverage validation.
Fix high-confidence content defects found during the audit and track lower-confidence calibration questions as follow-up work.
Create a content audit with sample size, findings, fixes, residual risks, and recommendation on whether current content is release-ready.

source: Gap review: assessment calibration and content quality audit
